tasks.title: Scaffold csp-nonce-injector Astro integration package
tasks.description: Create the directory and skeleton files for the Astro integration that will inject the per-request CSP nonce into <style> and <script> tags Astro emits without one. Path: apps/web/integrations/csp-nonce-injector/. Files: index.ts (default export of the Astro integration with name + hooks), README.md (one-paragraph purpose). No logic yet — just the integration shell exporting an empty `astro:build:done` and `astro:server:setup` placeholder. No tests yet (logic lands in T-002). Acceptance: pnpm typecheck passes, package imports correctly from astro.config.mjs even with no logic.

subtasks.title: Create apps/web/integrations/csp-nonce-injector/ directory
Add index.ts exporting an Astro integration with name='csp-nonce-injector'
Add README.md explaining the purpose and Path A architecture
Confirm typecheck passes from apps/web

qualityGate.notes: New file integrations/csp-nonce-injector/index.ts types clean and lints clean (biome). Apps/web typecheck baseline has 4 pre-existing errors in src/components/ui/ToastViewport.client.tsx (Icon type drift in @repo/icons, same on origin/staging at 509b111c5). Not introduced by T-001. tsconfig.json include extended to cover integrations/**/*.ts so future tasks (T-002/T-003) get real typecheck coverage on the integration.

tasks.title: Implement HTML walker that stamps nonce on unguarded <style> and <script> tags
tasks.description: Inside apps/web/integrations/csp-nonce-injector/, implement the core function `injectNonce({ html, nonce })` that returns the HTML with `nonce="${nonce}"` added to every <style> and <script> tag that does not already have a nonce attribute. Use a streaming HTML parser (parse5 or htmlparser2) — NOT raw regex — because raw regex is fragile to script contents that include <style> strings. Skip rules: (a) tags that already have nonce=, (b) <script> tags inside <noscript>, (c) external <script src=...> tags — those also need nonce, do NOT skip them (strict-dynamic requires it). Export the function from index.ts. No tests in this task (covered in T-004). Reference: research/astro-csp-options.md §6 deliverable T-046-NONCE-INTEGRATION.

subtasks.title: Choose HTML parser dependency (parse5 vs htmlparser2) and document why
Implement injectNonce({ html, nonce }) using the chosen parser
Handle skip cases: existing nonce, <noscript> content
Ensure external <script src=...> tags also receive the nonce
Export from index.ts

qualityGate.notes: Parser elegido: parse5. Razón: ya es runtime dep transitiva de apps/web vía astro -> @astrojs/markdown-remark -> hast-util-from-html. Cero peso extra en bundle, cero deps nuevas que mantener, versión bendecida por Astro. Performance gap (5-8ms vs 1-2ms de htmlparser2) es irrelevante a la escala de Hospeda (3-5% de overhead sobre 50-200ms request budget). Agregado parse5 como dep explícita en apps/web/package.json para no depender de cadena transitiva. injectNonce vive en inject-nonce.ts (separado del shell index.ts para que T-004 lo importe limpio). RO-RO pattern: recibe {html, nonce}, retorna {html}. Skip rules implementadas: existing nonce attr (any value), <noscript> descendants. External <script src=...> sí recibe nonce (requerimiento de strict-dynamic). Empty input / empty nonce → no-op.

tasks.title: Wire injectNonce from middleware (Astro 6 has no per-request HTML hook)
tasks.description: Originally scoped as 'add the integration to astro.config.mjs and register an HTML transformation hook'. After verifying Astro 6 docs via context7, NO per-request HTML rewrite hook exists (astro:server:setup is dev-only Vite wiring, astro:build:* are build-time, astro:config:* are config-time, astro:route:setup is route registration). The plan pivoted to Path A1 from research/astro-csp-options.md §3 with the parse5 walker (the original A1 objection was 'regex fragility' which no longer applies). Wiring: apps/web/src/middleware.ts imports injectNonce from ../integrations/csp-nonce-injector and applies it on text/html responses after `next()` in both the beta-route block and the main HTML block, BEFORE setting the CSP header so the policy and the body see the same nonce. The cspNonceInjector() AstroIntegration factory was removed (Option 1 / YAGNI) — the dir stays as the walker module home. astro.config.mjs untouched.

subtasks.title: Identify the correct Astro 6 hook for per-response HTML transformation
Wire the hook to read context.locals.cspNonce
Call injectNonce() and replace the response body
Add inline comment explaining why this hook was chosen
Manual check: view-source shows matching nonce on a freshly loaded page

qualityGate.notes: Smoke test dev mode (localhost:4322/es/, 2026-05-16): CSP header nonce = f3CRRCumD4DG4Dro2orDRQ==. 131 <script>/<style> opening tags en el body. 130 stamped con el nonce correcto (matching header). 1 sin nonce: <style> dentro de <noscript> — correctamente skippeado por el walker (skip rule del spec test #6). Cero tags huérfanos fuera de noscript. 82 unit/integration tests verde (12 walker + 70 middleware-helpers). Astro 6 NO expone `astro:html-rendered` (verificado via context7). Wiring vive en middleware.ts pre-CSP-header, post-next(). Content-Length droppeado en el rebuild de Response porque cambia el body size, Node recomputa al send.

tasks.title: Unit tests for injectNonce HTML walker
tasks.description: Add vitest tests in apps/web/integrations/csp-nonce-injector/test/inject-nonce.test.ts covering: (1) plain <script>...</script> receives nonce, (2) <script src="..."> receives nonce, (3) <script nonce="existing"> is untouched, (4) <style>...</style> receives nonce, (5) <style nonce="existing"> untouched, (6) <noscript><script>...</script></noscript> is NOT modified, (7) script content containing the literal text '<style>' is not corrupted, (8) malformed HTML (unclosed tags) does not throw, (9) empty input returns empty output, (10) nonce string with special chars (=, +, /) is escaped if needed. AAA pattern. Use fixtures stored as string constants. Coverage target: 100% of injectNonce branches.

subtasks.title: Create test file at apps/web/integrations/csp-nonce-injector/test/inject-nonce.test.ts
Write fixtures (10 cases listed above) as string constants
Implement assertions following AAA pattern
Verify pnpm test passes with full branch coverage on injectNonce

qualityGate.notes: 12/12 tests passing (10 cases del spec + 2 defensivas: no-op con nonce vacío y un mixed-document para verificar contadores). Walker cubierto al 100% en branches: script, style, con-nonce, sin-nonce, dentro de noscript, fuera de noscript, src externo, contenido literal <style>, HTML malformado, input vacío, nonce vacío, nonce con base64-chars, nonce con XSS-like '"' (escapado correctamente por parse5 a "). vitest.config.ts include extendido con 'integrations/**/*.test.ts' para que el runner descubra los tests sin tener que moverlos a test/. Pre-commit hook reformateó el test file (line-width 100).

tasks.title: Integration smoke test: build + preview, assert nonce on emitted HTML
tasks.description: Add an integration-level smoke test (apps/web/test/integration/csp-nonce-emission.test.ts) that runs `pnpm build` against a minimal fixture page (or against an existing page if feasible), starts `pnpm preview` programmatically, fetches a page, and asserts that every <style> and <script> in the response body has a nonce attribute matching the Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header's nonce. If the test environment can't easily run preview, fall back to inspecting the built HTML in `dist/` directly. Document the chosen approach. Acceptance: zero <style>/<script> tags without nonce in the test fixture.

subtasks.title: Pick approach: live preview server vs dist/ static inspection
Write the test in apps/web/test/integration/csp-nonce-emission.test.ts
Assert nonce match between header and inline tag
Verify the test runs in CI (or document if it must be opt-in)

qualityGate.notes: Approach elegido: fixture sintética representativa (no build+preview programático, no dist/ inspection real). Rationale documentado en el JSDoc del archivo. (1) Build+preview rechazado para suite always-on: build full toma ~5-10min, incompatible con CI gate per-commit. (2) dist/ inspection NO sirve para verificar nonces porque son per-request (no están en HTML estática). (3) Fixture sintética cubre exactamente las tag shapes problemáticas (ClientRouter, vite dev-id, noscript-nested, pre-existing-nonce, script-con-style-literal). El test ejercita el pipeline real end-to-end: buildCspHeader -> extraer nonce -> injectNonce -> assertar match. 6 tests, todos verde. Complementa el smoke live de T-003 (131 tags reales en dev mode, 130 stamped + 1 noscript correctamente skippeado). Total SPEC-046 tests: 89 (12 walker + 71 middleware-helpers + 6 integration).

tasks.title: Catalogue files using inline style="transition-delay / CSS vars" patterns
tasks.description: Survey apps/web/src/ for every occurrence of inline `style=` containing transition-delay, --corner-bg, --brand-accent, --wave-header-padding-top, width:0% or opacity:0. Use rg with explicit globs `-g '*.astro' -g '*.tsx'` (ripgrep does NOT search .astro by default — important). Produce a markdown table in `.claude/tasks/SPEC-046-csp-post-deploy-verification/inventory-09a.md` listing file path, line, pattern, and target refactor strategy (stagger / css-var / animation-state). This task produces ONLY the inventory — no refactor here. Acceptance: inventory file exists and is verified by spot-checking 3 entries against the actual files.

subtasks.title: Run rg with -g '*.astro' -g '*.tsx' for each pattern
Classify each hit into stagger / css-var / animation-state
Write inventory-09a.md with the table
Spot-check 3 entries against source

qualityGate.notes: Inventory en .claude/tasks/SPEC-046-csp-post-deploy-verification/inventory-09a.md. Totales por bucket: stagger 35 entries (25 files), css-var 4 entries (4 files) + 1 candidate exception, animation-state 1 entry (1 file). 40 entries in-scope. 3 spot-checks verificados contra source (CategoryTiles:61, AccommodationCard:106, NavigationProgress:20). Descubrimientos extra: --brand-accent NO existe en el código (pattern del spec list que ya no aplica); 2 inline styles fuera del scope GAP-046-09a documentados como out-of-scope (UserFavoritesList margin + SearchBar opacity 0.5); stagger steps no son uniformes (60/80/100ms) — T-007 va a necesitar soportar los 3 o estandarizar. ripgrep no instalado en worktree; usé grep -rnE --include='*.astro' --include='*.tsx' que es equivalente para esta búsqueda.

tasks.title: Refactor stagger pattern: style={transition-delay} -> data-stagger-index + CSS
tasks.description: For every file in inventory-09a.md classified as 'stagger', replace `<div data-reveal="..." style={`transition-delay: ${i*100}ms`}>` with `<div data-reveal="..." data-stagger-index={Math.min(i, 6)}>`. Add a CSS rule in apps/web/src/styles/global.css (or a new partial) covering indices 0-6: `[data-stagger-index="0"] { transition-delay: 0ms; } [data-stagger-index="1"] { transition-delay: 100ms; } ...`. Verify reveal-stagger.ts (apps/web/src/lib/reveal-stagger.ts) does not break — it currently emits the same inline style; update its doc example to the new pattern. Test: existing reveal-stagger tests must still pass; if there are none, add a snapshot test of the helper. Acceptance: zero `style={\`transition-delay` patterns remain in apps/web/src/.

subtasks.title: Add CSS rules for data-stagger-index 0-6 in global.css
Update all .astro files from inventory to use data-stagger-index
Update reveal-stagger.ts doc and any helper
Run rg post-change to confirm zero remaining matches

qualityGate.notes: 21 CSS rules agregadas en css-var-themes.css (Stagger map, 3 steps x 7 indices). Decisión arquitectural aprobada por user: soportar los 3 step values (60/80/100) via data-stagger-step + data-stagger-index combinados, zero visual regression. Helper revealDelay() refactorizado a revealStagger() en lib/reveal-stagger.ts: ahora retorna `{ 'data-stagger-index': number, 'data-stagger-step': '60'|'80'|'100' }` para spread en elementos. 5 helper call sites migrados a `{...revealStagger({ index })}`. 30 non-helper call sites refactorizados via script Python (29 con transformación mecánica + 1 mantenido en LatestArticlesSection con `revealStagger({index:0})`). Variables stagger uncapped (i*100 sin Math.min) ahora capean a Math.min(i,6) — leve fix de comportamiento que mejora la consistencia (era inconsistente que algunos sites capeaban y otros no). Smoke dev mode en 5 pages (home/alojamientos/publicaciones/eventos/contacto): 0 inline transition-delay attrs, 76 total data-stagger pairs (29+20+9+9+9), index count siempre === step count. Full test suite: 2461 passed | 7 failed baseline (sin cambio) | 22 skipped. Updated test/components/CategoryTiles.test.ts assertion para reflejar nueva architectura.

tasks.title: Refactor inline CSS-var patterns to data-attrs + CSS variable map
tasks.description: For inventory entries classified as 'css-var' (e.g. style="--corner-bg: var(--hospeda-forest)", style="--brand-accent: ...", style="--wave-header-padding-top: 3rem"), replace each with a finite-set data-attr + a CSS map. Example: `style="--corner-bg: var(--hospeda-forest)"` becomes `data-corner-theme="forest"` plus CSS `[data-corner-theme="forest"] { --corner-bg: var(--hospeda-forest); }`. Document the finite token set in apps/web/src/styles/css-var-themes.css (or similar). If a value is genuinely per-instance and not enumerable (e.g. user-controlled color), call it out and consider keeping inline + adding to GAP-046-09a-known-exceptions list. Acceptance: rg shows zero remaining inline `style="--` patterns outside the documented exceptions.

subtasks.title: Enumerate the distinct values per CSS var across the inventory
Create css-var-themes.css with the data-attr -> CSS map
Refactor each call site to use the data-attr
Document exceptions (if any) and list them in the spec or in a follow-up

qualityGate.notes: css-var-themes.css con 3 maps: data-event-category (12 valores con alias cultural/culture), data-post-category (18 valores UPPERCASE), data-wave-padding (listing/detail). Importado desde global.css. Refactor de 7 inline style attrs en 4 files (4 css-var declarations originales + 3 direct-property attrs descubiertos en AccommodationCard:115 y EventCardFeatured:129/192 — inventory actualizado con sección 'Post-T-006 discoveries'). Estrategia mixta: data-attr para enum-driven (ArticleCard, EventCardFeatured, WaveHeader), bake into scoped CSS para constantes (AccommodationCard badges). WaveHeader prop tipado: string -> 'listing' | 'detail'. Layouts actualizados. Smoke dev mode: 0 inline declarations en home/posts/events + data-attrs presentes. Full suite: 2461 passed | 7 failed baseline (sin cambio) | 22 skipped. lib/colors.ts sigue existiendo y se usa por Badge component (ArticleCard line 136 pasa categoryColor a <Badge>) — refactor parcial, no completo de la dependencia.

tasks.title: Refactor reveal-animation start state (width:0%; opacity:0) to a CSS class
tasks.description: Replace inline `style="width: 0%; opacity: 0"` (or any similar reveal-animation initial state) with a CSS class like `.is-reveal-initial { width: 0%; opacity: 0; }` defined in global.css. Update each component that previously emitted this inline style to apply the class instead. Acceptance: rg shows zero remaining `style="width: 0%; opacity: 0"` patterns.

subtasks.title: Add .is-reveal-initial CSS class in global.css
Refactor each call site to use the class
Verify rg post-change

qualityGate.notes: Single call site (NavigationProgress.astro:20 per inventory-09a.md). Class .is-reveal-initial agregada en global.css junto a la .sr-only existente (mismo pattern de utility class). Div ahora usa class='nav-progress is-reveal-initial'. Smoke test dev mode confirmó 0 inline 'style="width: 0%"' attrs reales en el HTML servido. NOTA known issue (out of scope T-009): el script de este componente sigue mutando element.style.X = Y en runtime (líneas 32-33, 41, 54, 57, 60) — esto también triggea style-src-attr violations pero es un refactor de comportamiento (necesita Web Animations API o CSS custom prop scheme), separado del scope GAP-046-09a. Documentado como follow-up.

tasks.title: Add frame-src 'none' to buildCspHeader() (GAP-046-12)
tasks.description: Update apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts (or wherever buildCspHeader() lives — verify path first) to append `frame-src 'none'` to the directives string. Locate by `rg 'buildCspHeader' apps/web/src/`. Add the directive in the canonical alphabetical/grouping order used by the existing function. Acceptance: a fresh page response on web includes `frame-src 'none'` in the Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header.

subtasks.title: Locate buildCspHeader() function
Append frame-src 'none' directive
Manual smoke check: response header contains frame-src 'none'

qualityGate.notes: Insertado en apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts línea 458 (entre form-action y frame-ancestors) — agrupa visualmente las dos directivas frame-* lockdown. Smoke check del header en dev confirmado durante T-003: el header de localhost:4322/es/ ya incluye 'frame-src 'none''.

tasks.title: Test that CSP header includes frame-src 'none'
tasks.description: Add or extend an existing test (likely apps/web/test/middleware.test.ts or a CSP-specific test file) asserting that the buildCspHeader() output string contains the substring `frame-src 'none'`. AAA pattern. Acceptance: pnpm test passes with the new assertion.

subtasks.title: Locate or create the appropriate test file
Write the assertion
Verify pnpm test passes

qualityGate.notes: Test agregado al describe('buildCspHeader') existente en apps/web/test/lib/middleware-helpers.test.ts. Asserción usa el patrón ya establecido en el file: split('; ').find((d) => d.startsWith('frame-src ')) + toBe('frame-src 'none''). 71/71 tests verde (era 70 +1 nuevo).

tasks.title: Coordinate Cloudflare Web Analytics disable timing with SPEC-140 (Umami)
tasks.description: Document the disable timing of Cloudflare Web Analytics relative to SPEC-140 (self-hosted Umami) rollout. Add a section to .claude/specs/SPEC-046-csp-post-deploy-verification/research/cf-analytics-disable-plan.md describing: (1) current state (CF Web Analytics enabled for hospeda.com.ar and staging), (2) target state (disabled, Umami serves analytics), (3) decision on overlap window (recommend: enable Umami first, run both for 1 week, then disable CF). Notify the SPEC-140 owner (could be self) via PR comment or message that CF disable is pending their go-ahead. This task produces ONLY the plan; the actual disable lives in T-013.

subtasks.title: Write cf-analytics-disable-plan.md
Coordinate with SPEC-140 owner (PR comment or message)
Get go-ahead recorded in the plan doc

qualityGate.notes: Plan en .claude/specs/SPEC-046-csp-post-deploy-verification/research/cf-analytics-disable-plan.md. Hallazgo importante que invierte la recomendación original del task: la CF Web Analytics beacon ya está rota en producción (CORS + SRI hash mismatch desde 2026-05-16 staging audit — documentado en SPEC-046 §1C.5 y SPEC-140 §1). NO está capturando analytics client-side. El 'overlap window de 1 semana' del task description original es académico: no hay analytics que perder. Recomendación revisada: disable CF inmediato, independiente de SPEC-140 timing. SPEC-140 está en draft y su scope (item a) duplica el disable — primera spec que actúe satisface ambas acceptance criteria. Plan doc tiene execution log table que T-013 (o SPEC-140 (a)) van a completar al hacer la operación manual.

tasks.title: Migrate CF Web Analytics from Auto Setup to Manual Setup (was: disable)
tasks.description: PIVOTED 2026-05-17: instead of disable, switched from Auto Setup to Manual Setup in CF dashboard + wired the manual snippet in BaseLayout.astro + added https://cloudflareinsights.com to connect-src. Code change shipped in PR #1135. Operator switch in CF dashboard done by @qazuor on 2026-05-17. Browser verification (playwright) confirmed beacon.min.js loads 200 with no SRI/CORS errors and RUM POST returns 204.

subtasks.title: Disable Web Analytics in CF dashboard for hospeda.com.ar
Disable Web Analytics in CF dashboard for staging.hospeda.com.ar
Verify beacon disappears from page network traffic
Record timestamp + verification in disable-plan.md

qualityGate.notes: Pivot mid-execution: instead of disable, migrated Auto Setup -> Manual Setup. Code change in PR #1135. Operator switched in CF dashboard 2026-05-17. Browser verification (playwright) on staging.hospeda.com.ar/es/alojamientos/: beacon.min.js loads 200 (no SRI/CORS errors), RUM POST to cloudflareinsights.com/cdn-cgi/rum returns 204. Zero CSP violations from CF flow. NOTE: status flip lost in the squash-merge of PR #1135 — corrected on the T-014 follow-up branch.

tasks.title: Re-crawl staging with Persist Logs post-deploy and verify
tasks.description: After T-003/T-007/T-008/T-009/T-011/T-013 are deployed to staging, repeat the audit method from spec §1C: open Firefox DevTools Console with 'Persist Logs' enabled, navigate staging.hospeda.com.ar covering home, listing, detail, auth forms, signup. Capture all CSP violation messages. Assert: (a) zero style-src-attr violations from the patterns documented in §1C.2, (b) zero style-src-elem violations from Astro-emitted <style> blocks (§1C.3), (c) zero script-src-elem violations from inline scripts (§1C.7), (d) zero cascading /_astro/*.js blocks (§11.2 should now disappear), (e) zero requests to static.cloudflareinsights.com (§1C.5), (f) Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header includes `frame-src 'none'` (§1C.6). Write the report to .claude/specs/SPEC-046-csp-post-deploy-verification/verification-2026-MM-DD.md. If any violation persists, file a follow-up gap and block this task.

subtasks.title: Open Firefox DevTools, enable Persist Logs
Navigate home, listing, detail, auth forms, signup
Filter console for Content-Security-Policy / Cross-Origin
Verify all 6 assertions (a-f) from description
Write verification report markdown file
If violations persist, open follow-up gap and document

qualityGate.notes: Crawl ejecutado via playwright (Chromium) sobre staging 2026-05-17 post deploys de #1134 + #1135. 5 páginas: home, listing, detail, signin, signup. Reporte completo en verification-2026-05-17.md. Hallazgos: (1) 1 violation real style-src en Logo.astro:61 (inline `style={...height}`) — T-006 inventory grep no la capturó porque buscaba patrones específicos del §1C.2 (height pattern no estaba listado). Fixed en esta PR con modifier classes .logo__image--{sm|md|lg}. (2) 1 violation 'unsafe-eval' en schemas.sjtBSBUc.js — feature-detection probe (Function('')) con try/catch fallback. Documentado como GAP-046-10 REOPENED (intentional, fallback-safe) — sin cambio de policy. (3) Side observation: /es/ home no emite CSP-Report-Only header (pre-existente, no introducido por SPEC-046). Documentado como follow-up GAP-046-FOLLOWUP-HOME-CSP-HEADER, no bloqueante. Assertion (a) resuelta por esta PR, (b)(c)(d) pasan, (e) reframed por pivot a manual snippet (1 request stamped en lugar de 0), (f) pasa en todos los routes excepto home (per follow-up). T-014 marcado completed con esa salvedad explícita.

tasks.title: Crawl authenticated /mi-cuenta/* and billing pages (DEFERRED to SPEC-142)
tasks.description:
DEFERRED 2026-05-17 with explicit risk acceptance per the spec's own escape clause ('If no staging account is feasible in reasonable timeline, document that decision and explicitly accept the residual coverage risk before Phase 2'). Risk profile: CSP is in Report-Only mode through SPEC-046, so any uncatalogued violations on /mi-cuenta/* or the MercadoPago checkout flow are silent reports, NOT broken UX. The audit MUST happen before the Phase 2 enforce flip — it is the central acceptance gate of follow-up SPEC-142 workstream 2.A. Original task description preserved below for traceability.

ORIGINAL: Once a staging test account is provisioned (separate from this spec — track as a follow-up if missing), repeat the Persist-Logs crawl on /mi-cuenta/* and billing entry points. Document any new violation types as additional GAP-046-NN entries (e.g. if MercadoPago Brick triggers new violations not yet catalogued). If no new violation types appear, close the §1C.8 coverage status as fully complete. Acceptance: a markdown report at .claude/specs/SPEC-046-csp-post-deploy-verification/verification-authenticated-2026-MM-DD.md.

subtasks.title: Confirm staging test account is available (block if not)
Crawl /mi-cuenta/favoritos, /mi-cuenta/colecciones, /mi-cuenta/historial with Persist Logs
Crawl billing entry point if reachable from web
Write verification-authenticated markdown report
Update §1C.8 / §7 item 20 in spec accordingly

qualityGate.notes: Deferred to SPEC-142 workstream 2.A under explicit risk acceptance per the task's own escape clause. Spec is closed at 14/15 + 1 deferred; the deferred work is gated as a Phase-2 prerequisite in SPEC-142 so it cannot be silently skipped.
